mxCell.value: Student goes to homepage and clicks 'Sign Up'
Student enters name, email, student ID, password, programme
System shows error: 'Account exists, please log in'
System creates account and assigns Student role
Student enters credentials on login page
3 failed attempts: lock account for 15 min
Student opens the course from dashboard
System informs student lesson is unavailable
System tracks page visits and interactions
System warns student before final submission
System stores score and attempt details
System generates feedback and identifies weak topics
System rejects submission and requests correction
System stores submission time and status
Educator enters course details (title, description, programme)
Educator adds modules to the course
System rejects content and requests correction
System makes lesson available to enrolled students
Educator selects or creates question bank items
System stores assessment and availability rules
System shows students with progress and performance data
System shows progress history and quiz performance
Admin opens moderation or announcement function
Admin reviews flagged or managed content
Admin approves, updates, or removes content
System records moderation or announcement action
